lore.english:
A former Taimanin, and an executive of Nomad, also known as the "Traitor Taimanin".

In the past she was a master of the Koukawa ninja clan but turned against it and recruited mercenaries, calling themselves the "Oboro Ninja Troops", and helped Nomad expand its power in Japan.

As an old archenemy of Igawa Asagi, the Almighty Taimanin, she was killed by her, but was revived by demonizing herself with evil medical techniques, and has been continuing the ill fate with Asagi ever since.

Her main weapon is a pair of steel claws, and she is able to control one's mind with her ninja art of hypnosis.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&ACC] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase ACC of All allies by 7.5% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase ACC of All allies by 7.5% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Claws[-]
skills.description:
Stabs the enemy with claws in both hands to attack 3 times
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:230102]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:230102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:230102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Stabs the enemy with claws in both hands to attack 3 times
Target hit is inflicted with (10%) Bleed at a 5% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Blooming Carnage[-]
skills.description:
Attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] with a strong raking attack
When attacking a target that has [&Bleeding], [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:230202]%)[-].
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:230203]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:230203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:230203] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Attacks ALL enemies with a strong raking attack
When attacking a target that has Bleed, CRIT Rate increases by (30%).
Target hit is inflicted with (10%) Bleed at a 50% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Wicked Slasher[-]
skills.description:
Jumps lightly and thrusts claws toward the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Confuse] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:230302]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:230302] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Jumps lightly and thrusts claws toward the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with Confusion at a 20% chance.
Duration: 1 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Traitor Taimanin[-]
skills.description:
When attacking an enemy with [&Bleeding], performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:230401]%) [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp][-].
For each [&Bleeding] the target possesses, the [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] dealt increases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:230402]%[-].
skills.description_readable:
When attacking an enemy with Bleed, performs a (15%) Life Steal.
For each Bleed the target possesses, the DMG dealt increases by 10%.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_2301]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_2303]
skill_data.description:
Lightly jumps and stabs the enemy with their claws.
Performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:231302]%)[-] [&Bleeding] [&Common_Word_Skill_DotBuffBurst] attack.
skill_data.description_readable:
Lightly jumps and stabs the enemy with their claws.
Performs a (75%) Bleed Debuff Explode attack.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_2302]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_2304]
skill_data.description:
Deals a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:231401]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp] when attacking.
For each [&Bleeding] inflicted on the enemy, increases [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:231402]%[-].
skill_data.description_readable:
Deals a (15%) Life Steal when attacking.
For each Bleed inflicted on the enemy, increases DMG by 10%.
